name: 3 Egg Whites with Apple & Brown Bread
instructions: Whisk egg whites and cook in a non-stick pan until set. Toast brown bread if desired. Serve egg whites alongside sliced apple and brown bread.

name: Oats with Low Fat Milk & Egg
instructions: Cook oats in low fat milk on medium heat, stirring until creamy. Boil or fry egg separately. Serve oatmeal in a bowl with egg on the side.

name: Besan Chilla with Apple
instructions: Mix besan with enough water to form a smooth batter. Add salt and green chilli. Heat non-stick pan, spray with oil, pour batter and cook like pancakes until golden on both sides. Serve with sliced apple.

name: Overnight Chia Seeds with Nuts & Eggs
instructions: Soak chia seeds in milk overnight in the refrigerator. In the morning, boil eggs for 8-10 minutes, peel and serve alongside the chia pudding with a handful of mixed nuts.

name: Oat Pancakes with Honey
instructions: Whisk all ingredients into a smooth batter. Spray a non-stick pan and heat over medium flame. Pour small portions to make 2-4 pancakes, cook until bubbles form, flip and cook the other side. Drizzle with honey and sprinkle cinnamon before serving.

name: Banana Oat Pancakes
instructions: Mash banana thoroughly. Mix with egg, oat flour, milk, vanilla and cocoa powder until a smooth batter forms. Cook on a non-stick pan sprayed with oil, making 2-4 small pancakes. Serve warm.

name: Cornflakes with Milk & Berries
instructions: Pour cornflakes into a bowl. Add cold low fat milk. Top with fresh berries or sliced apple. Serve immediately.

name: Protein Bar with Milk & Apple
instructions: Choose a low-sugar protein bar. Serve with a chilled glass of low fat milk and a whole apple on the side.

name: 2 Eggs with Brown Bread & Tea
instructions: Fry or boil eggs to preference. Toast brown bread. Brew tea without sugar. Serve together.

name: Roti with Salan & Tea
instructions: Serve fresh roti (80g, made with 1 tbsp oil) with any salan. Brew tea without sugar and serve on the side.

name: Egg & Greek Yogurt Combo
instructions: Cook eggs in preferred style (boiled, scrambled, or fried with minimal oil). Serve with a bowl of non-fat Greek yogurt and toasted brown bread.

name: Paneer Bhurji Plate
instructions: Crumble paneer and cook with diced vegetables and spices in a non-stick pan. Make a thin gram flour roti (60g) with minimal oil. Serve bhurji on the roti with almonds on the side.

name: High-Protein Chicken Wrap
instructions: Season and grill chicken breast until cooked through. Slice thinly. Layer onto roti or brown bread with fresh veggies. Roll up and serve with boiled egg on the side.

name: Yogurt Eggs & Fruit Combo
instructions: Boil eggs for 8-10 minutes. Serve Greek yogurt in a bowl with the peeled boiled eggs and fresh fruit on the side.

name: Shami Kebab Sandwich
instructions: Warm shami kebabs in a pan. Place inside brown bread slices with lettuce or chutney if desired. Serve with milk or unsweetened tea.

name: Oats with Granola & 2 Fruits
instructions: Cook oats with water or milk. Top with granola and chopped fresh fruits. Boil or fry one egg separately. Serve alongside tea or coffee.

name: Sausages with Egg Whites & Brown Bread
instructions: Cook sausages in a non-stick pan until browned. Whisk egg whites and cook separately in a sprayed pan. Serve with toasted brown bread and tea or coffee.

name: Low Cal Paratha with Egg
instructions: Roll whole wheat dough into a thin paratha and cook with 1 tbsp oil until golden. Fry one egg in minimal oil. Serve together with tea or milk.

name: Masala Oats
ingredients: salt and chilli powder to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. Add cumin, garlic, and chilli; fry 1 minute. Add onion and cook 2 minutes. Add tomato, carrot, peas, salt and chilli powder. Cook covered with 5-6 tbsp water for 3 minutes. Add oats, stir and cook 3-4 minutes on low flame until done.

name: Cereal with Low Fat Milk & Nuts
instructions: Pour cereal into a bowl and add cold low fat milk. Boil or fry egg separately. Serve cereal with egg and a small handful of nuts.

name: 2 Eggs with Brown Bread & Greek Yogurt
instructions: Cook eggs in preferred style. Toast brown bread. Serve with a small bowl of Greek yogurt on the side.

name: Fruit Salad with Chia Seeds
instructions: Chop all fruits into bite-sized pieces. Place in a bowl. Sprinkle chia seeds over the top and drizzle with honey. Toss gently and serve.

name: Avocado Toast with Egg
instructions: Toast brown bread. Mash avocado with a squeeze of lemon, salt and black pepper. Spread on toast. Poach or fry egg and place on top. Season and serve immediately.

name: Boiled Eggs with Fruit Bowl
instructions: Boil eggs for 8-10 minutes. Peel and season with salt and pepper. Prepare a bowl of mixed fresh fruits. Serve together.

name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
instructions: In a tall glass or bowl, layer Greek yogurt, granola, and berries. Repeat layers if desired. Drizzle honey on top. Serve immediately.

name: Egg Bhurji (Spiced Scrambled Eggs)
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Sauté onion until translucent. Add chilli and tomato, cook 2 minutes. Whisk eggs and pour in. Scramble on medium heat, add turmeric and salt. Garnish with coriander.

name: Vegetable Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a pan. Pour eggs, let base set. Add vegetables on one side. Fold omelette over and cook until fully set. Serve hot.

name: Egg Salad Sandwich
instructions: Boil eggs, peel and chop. Mix with mayonnaise, mustard, salt and pepper. Toast brown bread if desired. Assemble sandwich with egg mixture and lettuce.

name: Chicken Sandwich
instructions: Grill chicken breast with salt and spices. Slice thinly. Toast brown bread. Assemble sandwich with chicken, lettuce, tomato and sauce.

name: Paratha with Yogurt
instructions: Roll whole wheat dough into a thin paratha and cook with 1 tbsp oil. Serve with fresh plain yogurt and unsweetened tea.

name: Protein Egg Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. Mix in diced vegetables and spinach. Pour into a sprayed muffin tray. Bake 15-18 minutes until set. Makes 6 mini muffins.

name: Spinach Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender. Blend on high until completely smooth. Drink immediately for best nutrition.

name: Spinach & Egg Scramble
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. Sauté garlic for 30 seconds. Add spinach and cook until wilted. Beat eggs, pour over spinach and scramble on medium heat. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Strawberry Chia Smoothie
instructions: Blend strawberries, milk and sweetener until smooth. Pour into a glass. Stir in chia seeds. Let sit 5 minutes before drinking so chia can swell slightly.

name: Overnight Oats (Banana)
instructions: Mix oats in milk in a jar. Stir in honey and cinnamon. Cover and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, top with sliced banana and eat cold.

name: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal
instructions: Cook oats in milk on medium heat, stirring frequently. Once creamy, stir in chopped apple, cinnamon and honey. Cook 2 more minutes. Serve warm.

name: Methi Paratha (Thin)
instructions: Knead wheat flour with methi, salt and cumin with water to make a soft dough. Roll thin. Cook on a hot pan with 1 tsp oil each side until golden spots appear.

name: Moong Daal Chilla
instructions: Drain soaked daal and grind with ginger, chilli and cumin to a thick batter. Add salt. Heat a non-stick pan, spray with oil and pour batter for small pancakes. Cook both sides until golden.

name: Chia Seed Pudding
instructions: Mix chia seeds, milk, honey and vanilla thoroughly. Stir again after 5 minutes to prevent clumping. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight. Top with berries and serve.

name: Vegetable Dalia (Broken Wheat Porridge)
instructions: Roast dalia in ghee for 2 minutes. Add vegetables, cumin, salt and spices with 1.5 cups water. Cook covered on low heat for 15 minutes until soft and water is absorbed.

name: Sauteed Mushrooms on Toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan. Add garlic and thyme, cook 30 seconds. Add mushrooms and cook on medium-high heat until golden and all moisture evaporates. Season. Toast bread and top with mushrooms.

name: Egg White Omelette with Veggies
instructions: Whisk egg whites with salt and pepper until frothy. Spray pan with oil and heat. Pour egg whites, let base set. Add vegetables on one side. Fold omelette and cook through. Serve hot.

name: Grilled Chicken + Veggie Bowl with Brown Rice
instructions: Season chicken with salt, pepper and garlic powder. Grill on medium-high 5-6 minutes per side. Rest and slice. Sauté vegetables in olive oil with garlic. Serve chicken and vegetables over brown rice.

name: Butter Chicken with Brown Rice
instructions: Blend onion, tomato, chilli, cashews, yogurt and dry spices. Boil chicken in 4 cups water until one cup remains. Add blended paste, butter and garam masala. Cook 2-3 minutes on low flame. Add kasoori methi. Serve with brown rice.

name: Healthy Chicken Pasta
instructions: Boil pasta and chicken separately. Shred cooked chicken. Heat oil, fry ginger-garlic paste. Add vegetables and spices. Add pasta, chicken and sauces. Toss and cook 2 minutes on low flame.

name: Lemon Chicken with Stir Fry Veggies
instructions: Marinate chicken with lemon juice, yogurt, salt and spices. Cook in a pan with half cup water on low-medium flame with lid until done. Stir fry vegetables in olive oil for 3-4 minutes. Serve together.

name: Steam Chicken with BBQ Sauce & Veggies
instructions: Combine chicken with spices, vinegar, soy sauce and 2 cups water in a pan. Cook on medium until done. Stir fry vegetables in olive oil. Top chicken with BBQ sauce and serve with vegetables.

name: Grilled Chicken Curry (No Cream)
instructions: Marinate chicken with half the garlic, ginger, turmeric and 1 tbsp yogurt for 15 minutes. Grill 3-4 minutes per side. Sauté onion in oil, add remaining spices and garlic. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes. Add grilled chicken and remaining yogurt, simmer 2-3 minutes. Finish with lemon and cilantro.

name: Daal with Veggies
instructions: Boil lentils with turmeric and salt until soft. Prepare tempering: heat oil, add cumin, ginger-garlic paste and spices. Add vegetables and cook 5 minutes. Mix tempering with lentils and simmer together for 5 minutes.

name: Bean Salad with Chicken
instructions: Boil beans until tender. Mix with shredded chicken and chopped raw vegetables. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Toss well and serve.

name: Oat Mix with Daal & Chicken
instructions: Boil oats and lentils separately. Make masala: heat oil, fry ginger-garlic paste, onion, tomatoes and spices. Add oats, daal and chicken. Mix well and serve with chopped carrot and cucumber.

name: Chicken Tomato Soup
instructions: Cook oil with carrot, onion and garlic 6-8 minutes. Add flour, cook 1 minute. Add broth, oregano and tomato puree. Simmer 8-10 minutes. Blend in batches. Return to pot, add cream, salt and chicken. Cook 2-3 minutes. Season and serve.

name: Kebab Plate with Brown Rice
instructions: Grill or pan-cook kebabs on a non-stick pan until cooked through. Steam broccoli or vegetables. Cook brown rice. Serve all together on a plate.

name: Egg & Paneer Protein Plate
instructions: Sauté spinach and capsicum in a sprayed pan. Add crumbled paneer with salt and spices. Cook egg whites separately in a non-stick pan. Serve all with cooked brown rice.

name: Fish with Veggies
instructions: Season fish with lemon, salt, turmeric and herbs. Steam or bake at 180°C for 15-20 minutes. Stir fry vegetables with minimal oil. Serve together.

name: Chana Chaat with Air-Fried Samosa
instructions: Mix boiled chana with chaat masala, black salt, tamarind chutney and coriander. Spray samosas with oil, air fry at 180°C for 10-12 minutes. Serve chana chaat with samosas and one date.

name: Fruit Chaat with Kebab
ingredients: 15-18 tbsp mixed fresh fruit (apple, banana, orange, guava)
instructions: Chop all fruits, toss with black salt and chaat masala only (no added sugar). Grill kebabs until cooked through. Serve fruit chaat alongside kebabs with one date.

name: Chicken Pasta Salad
instructions: Cook pasta, drain and cool. Mix all vegetables together. Add chicken and pasta. Combine dressing ingredients and toss everything together. Serve at room temperature or chilled.

name: Minced Chicken with Veggies
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Brown minced chicken with ginger-garlic paste. Add spices and cook 2 minutes. Add vegetables and cook until tender. Divide into portions.

name: High-Protein Chicken Wrap (Lunch Version)
instructions: Grill and slice chicken. Spread hummus on tortilla. Layer chicken, lettuce and cucumber. Add salsa. Roll tightly, cut in half and serve.

name: Caesar Salad with Chicken
instructions: Grill chicken and slice. Tear lettuce into bite-sized pieces. Toss with Caesar dressing. Top with sliced chicken, parmesan and croutons if using.

name: Egg Salad Bowl
instructions: Boil eggs, peel and slice. Shred cabbage and chop other vegetables. Mix with mayonnaise and sauce. Top with sliced eggs and toss gently.

name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
instructions: Marinate chicken in shawarma spices. Grill until cooked. Slice thinly. Spread garlic sauce on tortilla. Fill with chicken and vegetables. Roll tightly and serve.

name: Tuna Salad
instructions: Drain tuna well. Chop all vegetables. Combine tuna with vegetables. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper. Toss and serve chilled.

name: Chickpea Veggie Bowl
instructions: Sauté chickpeas in olive oil with cumin and paprika until lightly crispy. Add vegetables and cook 5 minutes. Dress with lemon juice and salt. Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Mixed Bean Salad
instructions: Mix all boiled beans with chopped vegetables. Dress with olive oil, lemon juice and spices. Toss well and let marinate 10 minutes before serving.

name: Egg Fried Rice (Brown)
instructions: Cook and cool brown rice. In a wok, stir-fry garlic in oil. Add vegetables and cook 3 minutes. Push to side and scramble eggs. Add rice and soy sauce. Toss everything together and serve hot.

name: Chicken Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Cook chicken with garlic, ginger and soy sauce in a pan for 8-10 minutes. Add sesame oil. Spoon into lettuce leaves and top with spring onion.

name: Pea & Potato Curry (Aloo Matar)
instructions: Cook onion in oil until golden. Add spices and tomatoes, cook 5 minutes. Add potato and peas with water. Cover and simmer until potato is tender, about 15 minutes.

name: Chicken Chapli Kebab
instructions: Mix all ingredients together and form into flat patties. Cook on non-stick pan with minimal oil on medium heat, about 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through.

name: Karela (Bitter Gourd) Stir Fry
instructions: Rub sliced karela with salt, rest 15 minutes, then squeeze out excess water. Heat oil in pan. Fry onion, add karela and cook until tender. Add tomato and spices. Cook until dry.

name: Sabzi (Mixed Vegetables) with Roti
instructions: Chop all vegetables. Heat oil and fry garlic for 30 seconds. Add vegetables and spices. Cook covered on medium heat until tender. Serve with fresh roti.

name: Chicken Steak with Mashed Potato
instructions: Mix olive oil with spices. Brush onto chicken. Grill on medium-high heat 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through. Rest 3 minutes. Serve with mashed potato and steamed vegetables.

name: Steamed Fish with Herbs
instructions: Marinate fish with lemon, ginger, garlic, salt, pepper and turmeric. Let rest 10-15 minutes. Steam in a covered pan with 1/2 cup water for 10-25 minutes depending on thickness. Garnish with coriander.

name: Chicken Veggies Pasta (Dinner)
instructions: Boil pasta and chicken separately. Shred chicken. Sauté ginger-garlic paste in oil. Add vegetables and spices. Add pasta and chicken with soy sauce. Toss on low flame 2 minutes and serve.

name: Chicken Curry with Steam Veggies
instructions: Heat oil, fry onion golden. Add ginger-garlic paste and spices. Add tomatoes and cook until oil separates. Add chicken and cook 20-25 minutes until done. Serve alongside steamed vegetables.

name: Steam Fish (Ramadan Style)
instructions: Wash fish with vinegar and salt for 30 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Mix all spices and apply to fish. Steam in a pan with 2 glasses water for 30 minutes on medium heat. Serve with vegetables.

name: Oats with Veggies (Dinner)
instructions: Cook oats with water until creamy. Sauté vegetables in olive oil with spices until tender. Mix together in a bowl and serve warm.

name: Keema with Veggies
instructions: Brown mince with onion and ginger-garlic paste. Add spices and tomatoes, cook until dry. Add vegetables with 1/4 cup water. Cook until vegetables are tender and mixture is dry.

name: Grilled Chicken Veg Bowl (Dinner)
instructions: Grill chicken breast with seasonings. Sauté vegetables in olive oil. Cook brown rice. Serve all together in a bowl.

name: Daal with Veggies (Dinner)
instructions: Boil lentils with turmeric and salt until soft. Prepare tempering in oil with cumin and spices. Add cooked vegetables to tempering. Mix with lentils and simmer 5 minutes. Serve hot.

name: Chicken Steak with Veggies
instructions: Rub chicken with mixed spices. Grill or pan cook 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through. Rest and slice. Stir-fry vegetables in olive oil until tender. Serve together.

name: Lentil Soup (Dinner)
instructions: Cook lentils with carrot, onion, garlic and cumin in 4 cups water until very soft, about 20 minutes. Blend partially to desired consistency. Season with salt and lemon juice.

name: Shami Kebab with Veggies (Dinner)
instructions: Pan-cook kebabs on a lightly oiled non-stick pan until browned on both sides. Stir-fry or steam vegetables. Serve together.

name: Pasta Salad (Dinner)
instructions: Cook pasta and cool. Mix with shredded chicken and vegetables. Toss with olive oil, lemon and mustard dressing. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

name: Fish with Veggies (Dinner)
instructions: Season fish with spices and lemon. Bake or grill at 200°C for 15-20 minutes. Stir-fry vegetables in minimal oil. Serve fish over vegetables.

name: Burrito with Chicken
instructions: Grill and slice chicken. Warm tortilla. Layer with rice, chicken, lettuce and salsa. Add Greek yogurt instead of sour cream. Roll tightly and serve.

name: Chicken Soup (Dinner)
instructions: Boil chicken with broth, garlic and ginger. Add vegetables and simmer 20 minutes. Remove chicken, shred and return. Season and serve hot.

name: Creamy Chicken Tomato Soup
instructions: Cook onion, carrot and garlic in oil. Add flour and stir. Add broth, puree and oregano. Simmer 10 minutes. Blend and return to pot. Add cream and shredded chicken. Cook 2-3 minutes and serve.

name: Chicken with Roti (Dinner)
instructions: Prepare chicken in preferred style (curry, grilled or steamed). Make fresh roti (80g) with 1 tbsp oil. Serve with salad.

name: Egg & Veg Stir Fry (Dinner)
instructions: Stir-fry garlic in oil. Add vegetables and cook 4-5 minutes. Push to side, crack in eggs and scramble. Mix together with soy sauce. Season and serve hot.

name: Baked Mutton with Veggies
instructions: Marinate mutton with spices, ginger-garlic paste and oil. Bake at 180°C for 25-30 minutes. In last 15 minutes, add vegetables around the meat. Serve together.

name: Chicken Tikka (Baked)
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, spices and lemon for at least 2 hours or overnight. Bake at 200°C for 20-25 minutes turning once. Serve with salad.

name: Saag (Spinach) with Chicken
instructions: Cook chicken in spices until done. Add blanched, chopped spinach. Cook together 5-7 minutes until combined. Adjust seasoning. Serve with roti.

name: Masoor Daal
instructions: Boil lentils with turmeric until soft. Make tempering: heat oil, fry onion until golden, add ginger-garlic and spices. Add tomatoes, cook 5 minutes. Combine with lentils and simmer.

name: Mung Daal Khichdi
instructions: Rinse daal and rice. Cook together in 3 cups water with spices on low heat until soft and water absorbed (20-25 minutes). Stir in ghee and serve.

name: Grilled Salmon with Lemon
instructions: Marinate salmon with olive oil, lemon, garlic and dill for 30 minutes. Grill on medium-high heat 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through. Serve with lemon wedges.

name: Prawn Stir Fry with Veggies
instructions: Heat oil in a wok. Stir-fry garlic and ginger 30 seconds. Add prawns, cook 3-4 minutes until pink. Add vegetables and soy sauce. Cook 3 more minutes. Serve hot.

name: Egg Drop Soup
instructions: Bring broth to a gentle boil with ginger. Whisk eggs. Slowly drizzle eggs into broth while stirring constantly. The eggs will cook in thin ribbons. Add spring onion, salt and pepper. Serve immediately.

name: Chicken Biryani (Light)
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and biryani masala. Cook parboiled rice. Layer marinated chicken and rice in a pot. Add caramelized onion and mint. Cook on dum (low heat with sealed lid) 15 minutes.

name: Palak Paneer (Low Fat)
instructions: Blanch spinach and blend to puree. Cook onion, garlic, ginger and spices in oil. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes. Add spinach puree and cubed paneer. Simmer 10 minutes.

name: Zucchini Noodles with Chicken
instructions: Grill and slice chicken. Sauté zucchini noodles with garlic in olive oil for 3-4 minutes (don't overcook). Top with chicken and tomato sauce. Season and serve.

name: Lobia (Black Eyed Peas) Curry
instructions: Boil soaked lobia until tender. Prepare masala: fry onion, add ginger-garlic and spices, add tomatoes and cook. Combine with lobia and simmer 15 minutes.

name: Baingan Bharta
instructions: Roast eggplant over direct flame until charred and soft. Peel and mash. Cook onion, garlic and chilli in oil. Add tomatoes and spices. Add mashed eggplant and cook 10 minutes.

name: Chicken Seekh Kebab
instructions: Mix all ingredients thoroughly. Shape firmly around skewers. Grill on medium-high heat turning regularly for 10-12 minutes until cooked through.

name: Tarka Daal (Yellow Lentil)
instructions: Boil lentils with turmeric and salt until completely soft. Prepare tempering: heat ghee, add cumin, garlic and red chilli. Cook until garlic is golden. Pour sizzling tempering over daal.

name: Grilled Salmon with Vegetables
instructions: Marinate salmon with oil, spices and lemon. Grill 4-5 minutes per side. Roast vegetables at 200°C for 20 minutes tossed in oil. Serve salmon over roasted vegetables.

name: Brown Rice with Daal
instructions: Cook brown rice separately in salted water. Boil lentils with turmeric. Prepare simple tempering with garlic and cumin. Mix tempering with lentils. Serve rice and daal together.

name: Methi (Fenugreek) Chicken
instructions: Cook onion in oil until golden. Add spices and tomatoes. Add chicken and yogurt, cook until chicken is done. Wash and add fresh methi leaves. Cook 5-7 minutes until wilted.

name: Pumpkin Soup
instructions: Cook onion and garlic in oil until soft. Add pumpkin and broth. Simmer 20 minutes until pumpkin is tender. Blend until smooth. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg.

name: Chicken Meatballs with Tomato Sauce
instructions: Mix chicken with garlic, onion, herbs, egg, salt and pepper. Roll into small balls. Bake at 180°C for 20 minutes. Serve with light tomato sauce.

name: Tomato Egg Soup
instructions: Blend tomatoes. Cook garlic in pan, add blended tomatoes and broth. Simmer 10 minutes. Reduce heat. Whisk eggs and drizzle in while stirring. Add coriander, season and serve.

name: Vegetable Soup
instructions: Chop all vegetables. Bring broth to boil with garlic and herbs. Add vegetables and simmer 15-20 minutes until tender. Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.

name: Khichdi (Rice & Lentil Porridge)
instructions: Rinse rice and daal. Cook together in 3 cups water with spices until very soft (25-30 minutes). Stir in ghee. Add any chopped vegetables if desired in last 10 minutes. Serve with yogurt.

name: Lauki (Bottle Gourd) Soup
instructions: Cook garlic and ginger briefly. Add lauki and broth. Simmer 20 minutes until very soft. Blend until smooth. Season with salt and pepper. Garnish with coriander.

name: Chicken Pesto Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta and reserve 2 tbsp pasta water. Grill and slice chicken. Sauté garlic in oil, add spinach and tomatoes. Toss with pasta, pesto and a splash of pasta water. Top with chicken.

name: Tinda (Apple Gourd) Curry
instructions: Cook onion in oil until golden. Add tomatoes and spices, cook until oil separates. Add tinda with 1/2 cup water. Cook covered until tender, about 15-20 minutes.

name: Saag (Mustard Greens)
instructions: Boil mustard greens and spinach until tender. Blend coarsely. Cook onion, garlic and ginger in ghee. Add greens and cornmeal to thicken. Simmer 15 minutes stirring occasionally. Serve with makki roti.

name: Cauliflower Rice
instructions: Grate cauliflower to rice-sized pieces. Heat oil in large pan. Cook garlic 30 seconds, add cauliflower. Cook on high heat 5-7 minutes until slightly golden. Season and garnish.

name: Roasted Veggie Bowl
ingredients: 200g mixed vegetables (sweet potato, zucchini, capsicum, onion)
instructions: Chop vegetables into similar sizes. Toss with olive oil, garlic, herbs, salt and pepper. Roast at 200°C for 25-30 minutes, turning once. Finish with lemon juice.

name: Chicken Korma (Light)
instructions: Cook onion in oil until deep golden. Add blended cashew-yogurt paste. Cook 3 minutes. Add chicken and spices. Simmer with 1/2 cup water until chicken is fully cooked.

name: Chicken Nihari (Lean)
instructions: Cook chicken with ghee and nihari masala in 3 cups water. Simmer 40 minutes until very tender. Mix flour with water and add to thicken. Simmer 10 more minutes. Garnish with ginger and lemon.

name: Aloo Gosht (Light)
instructions: Brown onion in oil. Add ginger-garlic paste and spices. Add mutton, cook until sealed. Add tomatoes. Cover and cook 30 minutes. Add potato with water, simmer until both are tender.

name: Chicken Chapli Kebab (Dinner)
instructions: Mix all ingredients together. Shape into flat round patties. Cook in non-stick pan with minimal oil on medium heat 4-5 minutes per side until cooked through.

name: 10 Almonds with Tea
instructions: Eat 10 raw almonds slowly. Brew tea without sugar and drink alongside.

name: Mixed Nuts Handful
ingredients: 1 handful mixed nuts (almonds, walnuts, cashews — approx 25g)
instructions: Measure one handful of mixed nuts. Eat slowly and mindfully.

name: 100g Seasonal Fruit
ingredients: 100g seasonal fruit (apple, orange, guava, or pear)
instructions: Wash fruit thoroughly. Eat fresh. Weigh to ensure 100g portion.

name: Tea with 2 Plain Biscuits
instructions: Brew tea without sugar. Enjoy with 2 plain biscuits.

name: 2 Dates with 5 Almonds
instructions: Eat 2 dates and 5 almonds together as a quick energy snack.

name: 3 Dried Apricots with 10 Raisins
instructions: Enjoy dried apricots and raisins as a natural sweet snack.

name: Low-Cal Veg Pakora (Air Fried)
instructions: Mix besan, spices and vegetables with very little water to make thick batter. Drop spoonfuls onto sprayed non-stick pan or air fryer tray. Cook 6-8 minutes flipping halfway until golden.

name: Dahi Bhalla (No Fry)
instructions: Grind daal with very little water to thick paste. Add baking soda, spices and onion. Steam or air fry at 180°C for 10-12 minutes. Soak in warm salted water 5 minutes, squeeze out water. Serve with yogurt and chutneys.

name: Apple Slices with Cinnamon
instructions: Core and slice apple into thin wedges. Arrange on a plate and sprinkle with cinnamon. Eat immediately.

name: Vitamin C Fruit Cup
instructions: Peel and segment fresh citrus fruit. Eat fresh for maximum vitamin C benefit.

name: 5 Almonds & 5 Cashews
instructions: Eat a small mix of almonds and cashews as a quick snack.

name: Lemon Water with Chia Seeds
instructions: Mix lemon juice and chia seeds in water. Stir well. Let sit 5 minutes for chia to swell. Drink.

name: Popcorn (Plain/Lightly Salted)
instructions: Air-pop corn kernels in a microwave or air popper without butter. Sprinkle lightly with salt and serve.

name: Cucumber & Carrot Sticks
instructions: Cut cucumber and carrot into sticks. Sprinkle with black salt. Eat fresh.

name: Protein Bar
instructions: Choose a low-sugar protein bar with at least 10g protein. Read label to ensure no excessive additives.

name: Boiled Egg Whites (2)
instructions: Boil eggs 8-10 minutes. Peel and discard yolks. Season whites with salt and pepper. Eat immediately.

name: Chana Chaat Cup
instructions: Mix boiled chana with chopped vegetables and spices. Squeeze fresh lemon on top and mix well.

name: Air Fried Samosa (2)
instructions: Spray samosas lightly with oil. Place in air fryer at 180°C for 10-12 minutes until golden and crispy.

name: Strawberry Diet Mocktail
instructions: Blend diet cola, strawberries, black salt and ice together. Pour and serve immediately chilled.

name: Almond Milk Shake
instructions: Soak almonds in water for 2 hours. Peel skin. Blend almonds with milk, ice and sweetener until smooth. Serve chilled.

name: Banana Milk Shake
instructions: Break banana into pieces. Blend with milk, ice and sweetener until smooth and creamy. Serve immediately.

name: Date Milk Drink
instructions: Remove pits from dates. Blend dates with milk and ice until completely smooth. Serve cold.

name: Apple Milk Shake
instructions: Blend chopped apple with milk and ice. Sweeten with artificial sugar if desired. Serve cold.

name: Milo Milk Shake
instructions: Mix Milo in a small amount of warm milk until dissolved. Blend with remaining cold milk and ice. Serve cold.

name: Watermelon Diet Mocktail
instructions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth. Serve immediately in a chilled glass.

name: Rusk with Tea
instructions: Brew tea without sugar. Dip rusk briefly in warm tea and enjoy.

name: Greek Yogurt Cup
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into a cup or bowl. Sprinkle with cinnamon. Eat cold.

name: Seekh Kebab with Fruit
instructions: Grill seekh kebabs on medium heat until cooked through. Serve with 2 pieces of fresh fruit.

name: Dahi Fruit Cup
instructions: Spoon yogurt into a bowl. Mix in chopped fruit. Drizzle with honey and serve chilled.

name: Grilled Corn on the Cob
instructions: Grill corn on open flame or grill until slightly charred on all sides. Rub with lemon juice and sprinkle with black pepper and chaat masala. Serve hot.

name: Mango Lassi (Low Sugar)
instructions: Blend mango, yogurt, sweetener, ice and cardamom until smooth and frothy. Serve chilled.

name: Grilled Paneer Skewers
instructions: Marinate paneer and vegetables in yogurt with spices for 30 minutes. Thread alternately on skewers. Grill or air-fry until charred on edges.

name: Oat Energy Balls
instructions: Mix all ingredients together. Add tiny amount of water if too dry. Roll into 6-8 small balls. Refrigerate 1 hour until firm. Serve 2-3 balls per snack.

name: Watermelon Feta Salad
instructions: Arrange watermelon cubes in a bowl. Crumble feta over the top. Add torn mint leaves. Drizzle with lemon juice and season with black pepper.

name: Beetroot Salad
instructions: Boil or roast beetroot until tender. Peel and slice or dice. Dress with lemon juice, salt and cumin. Serve warm or chilled.

name: Baked Sweet Potato
instructions: Scrub sweet potato. Wrap in foil and bake at 200°C for 45-50 minutes until soft when pierced. Open and sprinkle with cinnamon and a pinch of salt.

name: Roasted Pumpkin Seeds
instructions: Clean pumpkin seeds and dry completely. Spray lightly with oil and sprinkle salt. Spread on baking sheet. Roast at 160°C for 15 minutes until golden. Cool before eating.

name: Stewed Pears with Cinnamon
instructions: Halve and core pear. Place in small saucepan with water and cinnamon. Simmer 10-15 minutes until tender. Add sweetener if desired. Serve warm.

name: Kale Chips (Baked)
instructions: Tear kale into chip-sized pieces, remove thick stems. Spray lightly with oil. Season with salt and garlic powder. Bake at 175°C for 10-15 minutes until crisp. Watch carefully to prevent burning.

name: Mixed Raita
instructions: Whisk yogurt smooth. Mix in all chopped vegetables and spices. Chill for 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with coriander.

name: Boiled Chickpea Snack
instructions: Mix boiled chickpeas with chaat masala, black salt and lemon juice. Garnish with fresh coriander. Serve warm or cold.

name: Moong Daal Halwa (Festival, Moderate)
instructions: Cook ground daal in ghee stirring constantly until golden and fragrant. Add milk and sweetener. Cook until thick. Garnish with cardamom.

name: Avocado Egg Salad
instructions: Mash avocado with lemon, salt and pepper. Chop boiled eggs and fold in. Add red onion and coriander. Mix gently. Serve on lettuce or brown bread.

name: Carrot Ginger Soup
instructions: Toss carrots and onion with oil. Roast at 200°C for 20 minutes. Transfer to pot with broth and ginger. Blend until smooth. Season with salt and pepper. Serve warm.

name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Wrap
instructions: Grill and slice chicken. Spread Caesar dressing on tortilla. Layer with lettuce, chicken and parmesan. Roll tightly and cut diagonally.

name: Daal Soup with Veggies
instructions: Boil daal with turmeric. Add vegetables and cook until soft. Blend half the soup for creaminess. Add tempering of garlic in olive oil. Season and finish with lemon juice.

name: Green Tea
instructions: Heat water to 80°C (not boiling). Steep green tea bag for 2-3 minutes. Remove bag and drink warm.

name: Green Tea with Lemon & Flaxseeds
instructions: Brew green tea for 2-3 minutes. Remove bag. Add lemon juice and ground flaxseed. Stir well and drink warm.

name: Anti-Inflammatory Turmeric Ginger Drink
instructions: Boil ginger slices in water for 5-7 minutes. Pour into cup and add turmeric powder. Add black pepper and lemon juice. Sweeten with honey. Drink warm, preferably on empty stomach or after lunch.

name: Green Tea with Cinnamon & ACV
instructions: Boil water with cinnamon for 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add green tea bag. Steep 2-3 minutes. Strain. Cool slightly, then add ACV and honey. Drink before meals.

name: Morning Cinnamon Tea
instructions: Boil water with cinnamon stick for 1-2 minutes. Strain and drink warm before breakfast.

name: Morning Cumin Tea
instructions: Boil water with cumin seeds for 1-2 minutes. Strain and drink lukewarm.

name: Night Fennel Seed Drink
instructions: Boil water with fennel seeds for 1-2 minutes. Strain and drink warm at night for digestion.

name: Fat Cutter Tea
instructions: Add cinnamon and lemongrass to water. Boil 1 minute. Add green tea bag. Steep 2 minutes. Strain and add lemon juice. Drink warm.

name: Night Turmeric Lemongrass Drink
instructions: Boil water with lemongrass and turmeric for 1 minute. Strain and drink lukewarm at night.

name: Cardamom Fennel Morning Tea
instructions: Boil water with cardamom and fennel seeds. Strain and drink warm before breakfast.

name: Ginger Green Tea
instructions: Boil water with ginger for 2-3 minutes. Add green tea bag and steep 2 minutes. Strain and drink warm.

name: Detox Water with ACV & Basil Seeds
instructions: Combine ACV and basil seeds in a large jug of water. Let basil seeds soak 10 minutes to swell. Sip throughout the day.

name: Mint Lemon Detox Water
instructions: Add mint leaves and lemon slices to a jug of water. Infuse for 2 hours minimum or overnight. Drink throughout the day.

name: Warm Turmeric Water
instructions: Add a pinch of turmeric to warm (not boiling) water. Stir well and sip slowly.

name: Lemon Water (Plain)
instructions: Squeeze fresh lemon juice into water. Drink at room temperature, preferably in the morning.

name: Cucumber Grapefruit Juice
instructions: Blend cucumbers and grapefruit with mint and ice. Strain through a sieve. Add black salt to taste. Serve chilled.

name: Cucumber Carrot Juice
instructions: Blend cucumbers, carrots and mint. Strain and add ice. Season with black salt and serve chilled.

name: Chamomile Honey Tea
instructions: Steep chamomile tea bag in hot water for 3-4 minutes. Remove bag. Add honey and stir. Drink warm before bed.

name: Peppermint Tea
ingredients: 1 peppermint tea bag or fresh mint leaves
instructions: Steep peppermint in hot water for 3-5 minutes. Remove bag or strain. Drink warm after meals for digestive comfort.

name: Masala Chai (Low Sugar)
instructions: Boil water with cardamom and cinnamon for 2 minutes. Add tea leaves and milk. Simmer 2-3 minutes. Strain, add artificial sweetener and serve.

name: Hibiscus Tea
ingredients: 1 tbsp dried hibiscus flowers or 1 hibiscus tea bag
instructions: Steep hibiscus in hot water for 5 minutes. Strain. Serve hot or cold with lemon if desired.

name: Coriander Seed Tea
instructions: Boil coriander seeds in water for 3-5 minutes. Strain and drink warm. Good for digestion and bloating.

name: Ajwain (Carom) Tea
instructions: Boil ajwain seeds in water for 2-3 minutes. Strain. Drink warm after meals to relieve bloating.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
instructions: Mix coffee grounds with cold water. Refrigerate overnight (12-16 hours). Strain through fine mesh or coffee filter. Serve over ice.

name: Rose Water Milk
instructions: Warm milk gently. Add rose water and cardamom. Sweeten if desired. Drink warm.

name: Saunf Mishri Drink
instructions: Boil fennel seeds in water for 2 minutes. Strain. Add a tiny pinch of rock sugar. Drink after meals for digestion.

name: Aloe Vera Juice
instructions: Extract fresh aloe vera gel from leaf. Blend with water and lemon juice until smooth. Strain. Drink on empty stomach for detox.

name: Ashwagandha Milk (Night Drink)
instructions: Warm milk. Add ashwagandha, turmeric and cinnamon. Whisk until combined. Sweeten with honey if desired. Drink 30 minutes before bed.

name: Tamarind Water (Imli Pani)
instructions: Dissolve tamarind paste in water. Add black salt and cumin. Mix well. Strain through a sieve. Add sweetener. Serve over ice.

name: Pineapple Ginger Detox Tea
instructions: Boil pineapple and ginger in water for 5-7 minutes. Strain. Add lemon juice. Serve warm or chilled.

name: Haldi Doodh (Golden Milk)
instructions: Warm milk on low heat. Add turmeric, black pepper and cinnamon. Whisk until frothy and well combined. Add honey. Drink warm before bed.

name: Spiced Buttermilk (Chaas)
instructions: Whisk yogurt with water until smooth. Add cumin, black salt, mint and ginger. Stir well and serve chilled.

name: Jeera (Cumin) Water
instructions: Soak cumin seeds overnight, or boil for 2 minutes. Strain. Drink warm on empty stomach for metabolic benefits.

name: Watermelon Mint Agua Fresca
instructions: Blend watermelon until smooth. Strain. Add water, mint, lemon juice and black salt. Stir well and serve chilled over ice.

name: Lavender Tea
ingredients: 1 tsp dried lavender buds or 1 lavender tea bag
instructions: Steep lavender in hot water for 5 minutes. Strain. Add honey if desired. Drink warm to relieve stress and improve sleep.

name: Sattu Drink
instructions: Mix sattu in water until fully dissolved. Add lemon juice, black salt and cumin. Stir well. Drink as a refreshing energy drink.

name: Chicken Yakhni Soup
instructions: Simmer chicken bones with whole spices, garlic, ginger and salt for 30-40 minutes. Strain into cups. Serve hot garnished with coriander.

name: Chicken with Roti & Salad
instructions: Prepare chicken in preferred style. Make fresh roti (80g) with 1 tbsp oil only. Prepare a simple salad with cucumber, tomato and lettuce. Serve together.

name: Steam Chicken with Veggies (Lunch)
instructions: Season chicken with salt, pepper and lemon. Steam in a covered pan with 1 cup water until fully cooked. Steam or lightly sauté vegetables. Serve together.

name: Shami Kebab with Veggies (Lunch)
instructions: Cook shami kebabs in a non-stick pan with minimal oil until heated through. Stir-fry vegetables in olive oil with spices. Serve together.

name: Whole Wheat Pancakes
instructions: Whisk flour, egg, milk, baking powder, honey and cinnamon to smooth batter. Spray pan and cook small pancakes on medium heat, flipping when bubbles form. Serve warm.

name: Turmeric Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Whisk eggs with turmeric and cumin. Sauté onion in olive oil 2 minutes. Add eggs and scramble on medium heat until just set. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Cottage Cheese (Paneer) with Fruit
instructions: Slice fruit. Serve cottage cheese in a bowl alongside fresh fruit. Drizzle honey and sprinkle cinnamon over both.

name: Lentil and Spinach Soup
instructions: Fry onion and garlic in oil. Add spices. Add lentils and 3 cups water. Simmer 15 minutes. Add spinach and cook 5 more minutes. Season with salt and lemon.

name: Quinoa Chicken Bowl
ingredients: lemon dressing (olive oil, lemon, garlic, salt)
instructions: Cook quinoa according to package. Grill and slice chicken. Assemble bowl with quinoa, chicken, greens and avocado. Drizzle with lemon dressing.

name: Baked Cod with Vegetables
instructions: Place fish in baking dish. Surround with vegetables. Drizzle olive oil, add garlic, herbs and lemon. Bake at 200°C for 20-25 minutes until fish flakes easily.

name: Chickpea Spinach Curry
instructions: Cook onion in oil. Add ginger-garlic and spices. Add tomatoes and cook 5 minutes. Add chickpeas and 1/2 cup water. Simmer 10 minutes. Stir in spinach and cook 3 minutes.

name: Turkey Meatball Soup
instructions: Mix mince with egg, garlic, herbs, salt. Roll into small balls. Bring broth to boil with carrot. Add meatballs and pasta/rice. Cook 15 minutes. Add spinach and serve.

name: Hummus with Veggie Sticks
instructions: Cut vegetables into sticks. Serve with hummus as a dip.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
instructions: Whisk matcha with hot water to form a smooth paste. Pour cold milk over ice in a glass. Add matcha mixture on top and stir. Sweeten if desired.

name: Stuffed Bell Peppers (Chicken & Rice)
instructions: Sauté onion in oil. Add chicken, cook through. Mix in rice, tomato and spices. Fill pepper halves with mixture. Bake at 180°C for 25-30 minutes until peppers are tender.

name: Miso Soup with Tofu
instructions: Bring water to near boil. Dissolve miso paste in a small amount of hot water. Add to pot (do not boil). Add tofu, spring onion and seaweed. Serve immediately.

name: Spicy Roasted Chickpeas
instructions: Dry chickpeas completely. Toss with oil and spices. Spread on baking tray. Roast at 200°C for 25-30 minutes until crispy. Cool completely before eating.

name: Overnight Refrigerator Oats with Berries
instructions: Combine oats, milk, chia seeds, honey and vanilla. Mix well. Cover and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, top with berries.

name: Lemon Herb Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook and cool quinoa. Mix with vegetables and herbs. Dress with olive oil, lemon, salt and pepper. Top with crumbled feta and serve.

name: Chicken and Vegetable Stir Fry
ingredients: 2 cups mixed vegetables (broccoli, capsicum, snap peas)
instructions: Heat oil in wok on high. Stir-fry chicken 4-5 minutes until cooked. Remove. Stir-fry vegetables 3-4 minutes. Add chicken back with soy sauce, garlic and ginger. Toss with sesame oil.

name: Warm Lemon Ginger Honey Drink
instructions: Grate ginger and squeeze juice from it. Mix with lemon juice and honey in warm water. Stir until honey dissolves. Drink warm.

name: Poached Egg on Spinach
instructions: Sauté spinach with garlic in olive oil until wilted. Season. Bring a pan of water to simmer, add vinegar. Swirl water, drop in eggs and poach 3-4 minutes. Serve eggs on spinach.

name: Lentil and Vegetable Stew
instructions: Fry garlic in oil with cumin and turmeric. Add vegetables and lentils with 3 cups water. Simmer 25-30 minutes. Add tomato in last 10 minutes. Season with salt and lemon.

name: Skinny Pancakes with Fresh Fruit
instructions: Whisk eggs, oat flour, milk and vanilla to smooth batter. Spray pan and cook thin pancakes. Serve stacked with fresh fruit on top.
